what_worked_well.observation: Pre-Skill Execution Checklist addresses RCA-021 root cause directly
what_worked_well.evidence: Checklist makes skill execution requirements explicit and verifiable with 5 concrete verification points

what_worked_well.observation: Test-first approach validated exact requirements from RCA specification
what_worked_well.evidence: 24 shell tests validated exact text matches against RCA-021 lines 153-184

what_worked_well.observation: devforgeai-validate CLI gates ensured all 10 phases executed sequentially
what_worked_well.evidence: Phase state file tracked all phase completions with subagent invocations recorded

areas_for_improvement.observation: Testing DoD items could be more precise
areas_for_improvement.actual_approach: Validated with shell tests in tests/STORY-215/ instead
areas_for_improvement.recommendation: Update DoD templates to allow 'OR equivalent validation approaches'
areas_for_improvement.suggested_story_title: Allow equivalent validation approaches in DoD testing items

areas_for_improvement.observation: Integration testing for documentation stories may be heavyweight
areas_for_improvement.current_state: integration-tester subagent runs full cross-component validation
areas_for_improvement.recommendation: Consider lighter integration checks for documentation-only stories

framework_recommendations.title: JSON Format for AI Commentary Section
framework_recommendations.description: Convert AI Commentary & Recommendations section from Markdown prose to structured JSON format for better AI/LLM consumption
rationale: Structured JSON is parseable by session-miner and framework-analyst subagents
Enables aggregation of patterns across 100+ stories
Links recommendations to follow-up stories with tracking
Consistent schema enforces uniform structure across all workflows
framework_recommendations.implementation_notes: Modify dev-result-interpreter subagent to output JSON structure. Add schema validation. Update storage path conventions.

framework_recommendations.title: Story-Type-Aware TDD Phase Streamlining
framework_recommendations.description: Documentation stories could have streamlined TDD phases since no executable code is generated
framework_recommendations.rationale: Documentation-only stories don't require full backend-architect or integration-tester validation
framework_recommendations.implementation_notes: Add story_type detection in Phase 01 preflight, conditionally skip or simplify phases for documentation type

patterns_observed.pattern: Documentation stories follow same TDD phases as code stories
AI commentary contains valuable framework insights
patterns_observed.implication: Insights lost if not structured for aggregation

constraint_analysis.notes: All 6 context files validated correctly. tech-stack.md correctly identified Markdown as documentation format. No violations detected.
